underlying_goal: Execute phase 38 of their GSD workflow, collect signals, then design a deliberation template/skill that integrates with the signal lifecycle system
friction_detail: Initial deliberation skill assumed formal signal IDs as input, user pointed out conversations often start informally without explicit signals
brief_summary: User executed phase 38, collected signals, then iteratively designed a deliberation template and skill with signal gate integration, refining it across multiple rounds of feedback.
